session.objective: Close a session with a failed validation.

summary: [CODE] The local validation phase found a failing command.

changes_completed.description: Drafted deterministic assets but did not mark DoD complete.

decisions.description: Completion remains blocked until the failing command passes.

open_tasks.description: Fix the failed validation before opening PR.

insights.description: Blocked closeouts should preserve the exact command failure.

risks.description: DoD completion would be false without a passing validation rerun.

durable_updates.description: Do not update the ledger to complete while validation is failing.

next_handoff: [CODE] Fix validation errors and rerun the per-skill gates.
